title: Paying Off Your Mortgage Early Costs You $1M
hook: Every finance guru says pay off your house early — but the math shows that habit costs most homeowners over a million dollars.
angle: The opportunity cost of mortgage pre-payment vs. market investing — a genuine million-dollar mistake 71% of homeowners make without realizing it
audience: Homeowners in their 30s–50s who make extra mortgage payments or are seriously considering it
key_numbers: 71% of homeowners say early mortgage payoff is a top priority
3% annual gap between mortgage rate and market return
